prompt: Create a high-fashion cinematic cyber-angel portrait of an adult Asian woman with long wavy black hair, delicate cool-toned features, soft makeup, quiet eyes with a story-filled expression. She is seated on the floor in a luminous white surveillance-like room, posed gracefully with one leg folded and one knee bent, torso turned slightly, one hand raised above her head touching or guiding a glowing arc of light, the other hand floating near her chest. Transform the mood into a white / ivory / silver “light angel” aesthetic: she wears an ethereal layered white lace and tulle dress with translucent fabric, pearl and crystal chains, delicate arm jewelry, thigh chains, and large soft feathered white angel wings. The environment is pale blue-white and overexposed, filled with foggy bloom, reflective floor tiles, hanging paper prints of human eyes, scattered eye posters, white cables, an open white laptop in the lower left foreground, a white keyboard in the lower right foreground, and small glowing devices. A bright continuous light ribbon forms a halo-like arc above her and sweeps diagonally through the composition, creating a sense of redemption and pure signal. Add glitchy editorial typography in distressed white pixel text: large title “ARC OF LIGHT” at upper left; small quote at upper right “I FOLLOW THE ARC. IT DOES NOT END. IT REMEMBERS.”; small data text at left “SIGNAL PURE. NOISE SOFT. LIGHT ONLY.”; mid-right text “HALO ECHO”; lower-right headline “FEED ME LIGHT” with tiny subtext “SIGNAL FOUND. HEART ONLINE.” and “SPRING / SUMMER 2024 COLLECTION. 08”; lower-left small text “EYES OPEN. LIGHT RECEIVED. BEYOND THE STATIC.” Use a vertical 2:3 fashion poster composition, soft frontal lighting, pearlescent whites, subtle blue-gray shadows, angelic glow, gentle film grain, digital glitch artifacts, high detail, dreamy commercial photography, no dark gothic elements, no extra people, no watermark.
